_note: All banter copy. Use {PLAYER}, {TEAM}, {TEAM_A}, {TEAM_B}, {FRIEND}, {PTS}, {RANK} as template vars.

open: Today's card is open. {TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B}. Lock it in before the first ball.
Match is live. {TEAM_A} take on {TEAM_B}. What's your call?
{TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B}. The card's waiting. Clock's ticking.
locked: Done. Can't change your mind now. Good.
missed: No card this match. You had time.
Missed the window. {TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B} kicked off without your picks.

villainPick: You villain-picked {PLAYER}. {FRIEND} villain-picked someone different. One of you will regret this.
{PLAYER} is your villain. If they score 30 or take 2 wickets, that's on you.
Villain: {PLAYER}. Under 10 runs or no wickets and you're laughing. Over 30 or 2+ wickets and it costs you.
chaosBall: You said {ANSWER}. The chaos will reveal itself.

matchWinnerWrong: {TEAM} lost. {FRIEND} predicted {TEAM}. {FRIEND} is available for questions.
{TEAM} didn't win. {FRIEND} thought they would. Zero pts on the winner.
Wrong team. {FRIEND} had {TEAM}. The match disagreed.
villainUnder10: Under 10. {PLAYER} flopped exactly as predicted. {FRIEND} gets 15.
villainOver30: {PLAYER} scored {RUNS}. Your villain pick cost you 5.
villainNeutral: {RUNS} runs for {PLAYER}. Neither here nor there.
chaosBallCorrect: Your chaos ball landed. {FRIEND} had no idea it was happening.
chaosBallWrong: Chaos Ball missed. That's what chaos means.
Didn't happen. Zero from the Chaos Ball.
Chaos Ball: wrong. The match had other ideas.

noCardYet: Nobody's filled their card yet. Typical. The match starts in {TIME}.
Empty. The group hasn't moved. {TIME} left.
noMatchesToday: Nothing on today. Check back tomorrow.
The IPL is taking a day off. So can you.
seasonPicksEmpty: Season picks aren't locked yet. Opens before the first match.
Fill your season picks before the tournament begins.

header: Match done. Here's how it went.
Full time. Let's see the damage.
groupSplit: The group was {SPLIT} on the winner.
h2hWin: {FRIEND} takes the H2H. {OPPONENT} takes the loss.

onboarding.welcome: Pick your team. It sets your colours for the season.
onboarding.teamPicked: Locked in as a {TEAM} fan. Good choice.
onboarding.displayNamePrompt: What do the others call you?

seasonPicks.open: Season picks are open. Lock them in before the first ball of IPL {YEAR}.
seasonPicks.locked: Season picks locked. See you at the end.
seasonPicks.partiallyFilled: {COUNT} of {TOTAL} categories filled. Finish before the tournament starts.
